title: Cabinet map artifact manifest
goal: Define and validate a Cabinet-owned ecosystem map artifact manifest before Leitstand consumes map files as a dashboard source.

acceptance.assertion: A versioned Cabinet ecosystem-map artifact manifest records source commit, generated_at, artifact paths, digests, and non-claims.
Cabinet CI validates the manifest and fails if referenced map artifacts are missing or stale.
The manifest explicitly says it does not establish claim truth, runtime correctness, or merge readiness.

metadata.why_first: Leitstand should consume a source contract instead of guessing paths.
metadata.outcome: Already implemented in Cabinet PR #69 and revalidated on current Cabinet main; no additional Cabinet code change was necessary.

verified_acceptance.manifest-contract: docs/contracts/cabinet-ecosystem-map-artifact-manifest-v1.md and its schema define source commit, generated_at, artifact paths, SHA-256 digests and explicit non-claims; scripts/write_ecosystem_map_artifact_manifest.py emits and checks the contract.
verified_acceptance.ci-validation: Cabinet PR #69 passed Validate Ecosystem Map and all repository gates. Current Cabinet main 8ca544a8 also passes the Ecosystem Map workflow; local revalidation passed 7 focused manifest tests, renderer --check, writer write/check and 345 repository tests.
verified_acceptance.truth-boundary: The contract and generated payload explicitly do not establish claim truth, runtime correctness, merge readiness or test sufficiency.
